title: Remove admin-only registration restriction from backend

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, remove any access-control guard on the user registration functions (for internal, partner, and client) that restricts registration to admin-only callers. After this change, any authenticated Internet Identity principal must be able to call these registration functions without a role check blocking them.

quotes: Hapus logika lama yang membatasi hanya admin yang bisa mendaftarkan user lakukan hanya perintah ini saja

acceptanceCriteria: The registration functions (registerUser or equivalent for internal, partner, client) no longer contain a caller-role check that returns an error when the caller is not an admin.
A non-admin authenticated principal can call the registration function without receiving an authorization error.
Existing stable var storage and function signatures remain intact.

constraints: Only remove the admin-only guard on registration functions — do not modify any other logic, including approval functions or data structures.
Do not change approval/reject logic; only #admin and #adminUser should retain approve/reject access.
Do not modify any frontend files.
nonGoals: Adding new registration form fields or changing data structures.
Implementing the full approval workflow changes (separate future step).
Migration logic unless stable var schema is altered.
